name: Garuda

skills.name: Keen Feathers
skills.description: Basic Attacks can pierce and deal damage to enemies in their path.

skills.name: Arrows of Gold
skills.description: Conjures an arrow formation that deals continuous damage to targets within range while slowing them.

skills.name: Golden Winged Blessing
skills.description: Gains Movement Speed and a shield while dealing damage to nearby enemies.

skills.name: Wings of Judgment
skills.description: Sends arrows surging forward, dealing damage. Using the skill again shoots all remaining arrows, damaging nearby enemies, inflicting them with Dread, and removing all Physical Attack bonuses granted by their equipment.

skillsZh.name: 銳羽
skillsZh.description: 迦樓羅的普攻可以穿透路徑上的敵人造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 黃金羽箭
skillsZh.description: 迦樓羅召喚箭陣持續對陣內目標造成傷害和減速。

skillsZh.name: 金翅護佑
skillsZh.description: 迦樓羅獲得加速和護盾，並對周圍造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 審判之翼
skillsZh.description: 迦樓羅號令飛箭向前攻擊並造成傷害，再次施放可射出剩餘的飛箭，同時對周圍敵人造成傷害和恐懼，並清空裝備附加的物理攻擊效果。

tips: Build: Mask of Agony, Frozen Breath, Twilight Stream.
tipsZh: 迦樓羅（中路）：梯度 A，勝率 50.96%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：痛苦面具、凝冰之息、日暮之流.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 51.1%, pick 0.8%, ban 0.0%, tier A.
Strong into Athena, Zilong, Pei · Weak into Li Xin, Kaizer, Dun.

Garuda is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 51.1% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 0.8% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Garuda.

faqs.question: Is Garuda good in current season?
faqs.answer: Garuda is Tier A Mage with 50.96% win rate, 0.79% pick rate, and 0.03% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Garuda build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Mask of Agony, Frozen Breath, Twilight Stream, Savant's Wrath, Void Staff, Boots of Dexterity.

faqs.question: How to counter Garuda?
faqs.answer: Pick Li Xin, Kaizer, Dun. Strong into Athena, Zilong, Pei.

faqsZh.question: 迦樓羅 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 迦樓羅 為 A 梯度，勝率 50.96%、選取 0.79%、禁用 0.03%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 迦樓羅 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：痛苦面具、凝冰之息、日暮之流、博學者之怒、虛無法杖、急速戰靴.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 迦樓羅？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Li Xin、Kaizer、Dun。迦樓羅 克制 Athena、Zilong、Pei。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Athena, Zilong, Pei. Weak into: Li Xin, Kaizer, Dun.

guide.overview: Garuda is a Medium Mage (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 51.1% win rate and 0.8% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Garuda: Damage Basic Attacks can pierce and deal damage to enemies in their path.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Tranquility, Frozen Breath, Mask of Agony, then complete Void Staff, Savant's Wrath, Venomous Staff. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Nightmare, Hunt, Mind's eye for stats that match Garuda's Mage kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Arrows of Gold → Golden Winged Blessing → Wings of Judgment → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Wings of Judgment (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Arrows of Gold, and Wings of Judgment on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Arrows of Gold → Golden Winged Blessing → Wings of Judgment → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Mid Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
guide.teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
guide.highRank: Garuda is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 51.1% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 0.8% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Garuda.
comparisons: Garuda vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Garuda has +0.0% WR vs Daji in Camp data. Choose Garuda when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.
Garuda vs Angela (Mage, Tier S+): Angela is 2.3% pick / 51.8% WR. Angela wins 0.8% more often globally. Choose Garuda when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Angela for Mid Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Garuda excels into Athena, Zilong, Pei. Avoid blind picking into Li Xin, Kaizer, Dun without team peel.
